loop1.title: Live Operations & Runtime
loop1.note: Showing load factor and efficiency as proxies for runtime, availability, and service metrics — no direct duration/count columns are measured for this asset.

loop1.title: Runtime & Duty
loop1.note: Showing total active energy (proxy for run-hours) and average load factor — start counts and direct run-hours are not measured by this electrical meter.

loop1.title: Energy & Reliability
loop1.note: Showing total active/reactive/apparent energy and power factor — MTBF/MTTR are not measured by this asset.

loop1.title: Power Energy Analysis
loop1.note: Showing active, reactive, and apparent power history — capacity utilization scores (max/min/thresholds) are not measured by this meter.
